name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Premium polarized lenses with lightweight frames. Perfect for beach days and outdoor adventures.

name: Linen Summer Shirt
description: Breathable 100% organic linen shirt in a relaxed fit. Keeps you cool even in the hottest weather.

name: Organic Sunscreen SPF 50
description: Reef-safe, non-greasy mineral sunscreen with vitamin E and aloe vera. Broad spectrum water-resistant.

name: Woven Straw Beach Bag
description: Handcrafted straw bag with spacious interior and soft cotton lining. Features an internal pocket for small items.

name: Quick-Dry Swim Shorts
description: Engineered for performance and comfort. Vibrant tropical prints with reinforced stitching.

name: Insulated Water Bottle
description: Double-wall vacuum insulation keeps drinks ice cold for up to 24 hours. Durable powder-coated finish.

name: Wide-Brim Panama Hat
description: Classic hand-woven straw hat with an adjustable inner band. Provides excellent sun protection with a stylish silhouette.

name: Portable Mesh Hammock
description: Ultra-lightweight and breathable mesh design. Includes tree-friendly straps and a compact carrying pouch for easy travel.

name: After-Sun Aloe Gel
description: Soothing organic aloe vera enriched with cucumber extract and mint. Instantly cools and hydrates sun-exposed skin.

name: Floating Waterproof Phone Pouch
description: Universal size with a transparent window for touch-screen use. IPX8 certified, ensuring your device stays dry underwater.

name: Floral Summer Dress
description: Lightweight viscose fabric with a vibrant floral pattern. Features adjustable spaghetti straps and a flowing midi-length hem.

name: Sand-Free Beach Towel
description: Microfiber technology that shakes off sand instantly. Oversized design that folds down small enough to fit in a pocket.
